calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Feb-08-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ifeanyi Aguoji appeared by zoom in propria persona.

Mr. Aguoji stated that he moved to San Francisco during the pandemic, that the reason why it is necessary to change his date of birth from April 21, 1981 to April 20, 1981 is because when his parents submitted the paperwork to immigration, they noticed the mistake but thought if they spoke up it would delay the proceeding, and that his license is correct, but his passport isn't. The court granted the Petition to Establish Fact of Birth (order signed in open court). It is adjudged and decreed that on the 20th of April 1981 a male by the name of Ifeanyi Aguoji was born to Josephine Aguoji and Michael Aguoji in Kano, Nigeria.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: L. Maloney. Not reported.

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Jan-18-2022 Continued To Feb-08-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
